fields.helpText: This is the name of a drug used by this site.  Primary drug is used to allow order entry to be easier for non-pharmacy personnel and for display. THIS NAME MUST BE NAME ONLY, WITH NO DOSAGE.
This is used to designate any special handling that may apply to this primary drug.
This is any information that the pharmacy wants to convey to users who select this drug.  Common messages include restrictions that may have been placed on the drug.

This is the [DHCP] applications that may make use of this primary drug. This can be used by the applications as a screen, and allows the applications to edit information about the drug that is specific to the application.
This allows alternate names, such as trade names, to be entered for primary drugs, allowing primary drugs to be selected by the alternate  names.
